use_cases: Visualizing incident management flow from events to resolution in monitoring dashboards
Tracking conversion rates through multi-stage alert and incident response pipelines
Displaying tier-based incident resolution breakdown in DevOps/SRE dashboards
Showing hierarchical data reduction through incident lifecycle stages
Analyzing operational efficiency metrics across different response tiers
ai_summary: A Reaviz-powered funnel chart component displaying incident management flow with a purple gradient color scheme. Shows conversion from all events through alerts, incidents, escalation, and tier-based resolution stages. Features integrated metric cards with icons and includes framer-motion animations for visual polish. Designed for SaaS monitoring dashboards and DevOps incident tracking use cases.
